body: Task: Stay on unblocker-only support for the task_update / approval_required enrichment path. Audit whether Worker 1’s likely API/store composition cut still needs any minimal shared/core helper beyond RuntimeEvent::project() and RuntimeEvent::primary_entity_ref(); if yes, land only that smallest helper, otherwise leave a precise proof note that no domain/runtime expansion is needed. Success criteria: one minimal core diff or one explicit no-core-change-needed proof note backed by at least one narrow green test/command, with no broad contract growth. Relevant files: crates/cairn-domain/src/events.rs, crates/cairn-runtime/src/services, crates/cairn-store/src/projections, .coordination/mailbox/worker-2.md.
